news.title: Trump's new global tariff draws rebukes from trade partners over forced-labor justification
news.summary: U.S. trading partners have rejected the forced-labor rationale behind Trump's new global tariffs, while most signaled plans to keep negotiating.

news.title: U.S., other nations back open-source AI with 'strong security' at China summit
news.summary: The APEC statement is the first to include open-source cooperation at a minister level, said Li Lecheng, China's industry and information technology minister.

news.title: Japan core inflation rate in June creeps up from 4-year low as higher oil prices bite
news.summary: This is the first rise in core inflation since March, and was in line with the1.6% growth expected by economists polled by Reuters.

news.title: U.S. to see higher generic drug prices thanks to tariffs, CEO of leading India pharma firm warns
news.summary: CEO of Indian pharma company Dr Reddy's has warned that Trump's proposed tariffs on generic drugs will make them more expensive for patients.

news.title: China's largest memory chipmaker sparks fears of a cash drain as it readies for public debut
news.summary: CXMT is stoking fears that its blockbuster stock market debut could pull cash from China's equities.

news.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500, Dow Futures Shake Off Iran Jitters As Investors Turn To AI Hyperscaler Earnings: INTC, TSLA, TTD, HIMS In Focus
news.summary: Markets were primarily focused on earnings from major companies, alongside rising oil prices due to the continued tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

news.title: Amazon cracks down on use of AI images by sellers after New York law
news.summary: A recently enacted New York law mandates that companies disclose when an ad includes a "synthetic performer" in place of a human actor.

news.title: Allianz to buy HSBC’s Singapore insurance unit for $2.09 billion
news.summary: Allianz to acquire Singapore insurance business from HSBC

news.title: Intel's turnaround under CEO Lip-Bu Tan gains steam with another strong quarter
news.summary: It's hard not to be impressed by Tan, who, in a little more than a year, has transformed the company.

news.title: How to save for retirement when you're living paycheck to paycheck
news.summary: CNBC Select provides a decade-by-decade guide to building retirement savings on a tight budget.

news.title: Most FDA advisers say peptides like BPC-157 and TB-500 should be made available in the U.S. Here’s what happens next.
news.summary: The FDA is deciding whether seven peptides can be legally compounded, potentially opening the door to broader use in Americans.

news.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
news.summary: Stocks tumbled on Thursday, pressured by a sharp sell-off in Alphabet and Tesla, as well as a spike in oil prices. The Dow Industrials shed over 500 points.

news.title: IBM's Krishna tries to reassure investors that AI won't disrupt company's software unit
news.summary: IBM's CEO highlighted growing mainframe hardware capacity, and said software should "catch back up" within a year.

news.title: S&P 500, Dow, Nasdaq End Lower Over Capex Concerns, Surging Oil — CBRS, AMD, GOOGL, TSLA, MSTR In Focus
news.summary: Brent crude topped $100 a barrel, stoking inflation fears and driving Treasury yields to their highest levels of the year.

news.title: Intel's stock jumps as chipmaker rides AI boom to fastest revenue growth in almost 15 years
news.summary: Intel rallied after the company reported blowout earnings and guidance.

news.title: The August stock-market slump is a myth — so why does Wall Street keep repeating it?
news.summary: More than 200 years of data show stocks typically gain in August, while market volatility sits well below average.

news.title: S&P 500 flashes sell signals — options traders are bracing for wild swings in Apple, Meta and Microsoft
news.summary: Nervous investors set the stage for massive post-earnings moves in Wall Street’s biggest stocks.

news.title: Yes, the AI stock selloff looks terrifying. But it might actually save the bull market.
news.summary: The hottest tech trades of 2026 just got slammed — smart investors are buying anyway.

news.title: AMD’s rivalry with Nvidia is increasingly moving into a new realm
news.summary: The chip makers are best known for competing in the GPU business, but they’re stepping up their offerings in the attractive market for server CPUs.

news.title: Oracle signs 10-year software contract with Pentagon worth up to $7 billion
news.summary: Oracle will supply on-premises software to the U.S. Department of Defense.
